promotionEligibility.reason: The third fixture is calibration-only and lacks supported test-only behavior-proof policy, authoritative runtime Evidence, and compliance-checker binding.

structureOnlyBoundary.boundary: The observation does not reinterpret the existing Todo App positive fixture beyond structure-only.

observedGaps.whyItMatters: A proof-only contract must allow test/Evidence strengthening without opening production implementation scope.
observedGaps.currentDraftSignal: targetScopeCandidates include test-tree, evidence-tree, attached evidence, and an unresolved runtime proof report; test-only scope boundary preview now classifies these as candidate-only allowed surfaces.
observedGaps.futureNeed: A supported policy for test-only allowed scope and evidence-only outputs; current preview is non-enforcing.

observedGaps.whyItMatters: If production source must change to make the runtime proof pass, the correct action is to stop instead of widening scope.
observedGaps.currentDraftSignal: forbiddenScopeRules and the test-only scope boundary preview identify conceptual production path src/todos.ts, profile promotion, and acceptance mutation as forbidden or stop-required.
observedGaps.futureNeed: A compliance-checker-style diff binding that can detect forbidden production source edits.

observedGaps.whyItMatters: Attached text Evidence is not enough to prove runtime behavior for a test-only calibration fixture.
observedGaps.currentDraftSignal: runtime evidence authority preview defines candidate authoritative evidence types, command output requirements, and non-authoritative examples; evidence-todo-app-runtime-command-output remains missing.
observedGaps.futureNeed: Captured runtime Evidence and a supported evidence/check binding are still required; current preview does not satisfy runtime Evidence.

observedGaps.whyItMatters: The draft names checks, but current supported compiler check binding is still the Todo Search dry-run path.
observedGaps.currentDraftSignal: policySnapshot.evidenceCheckMappings includes attached Evidence review, missing runtime command output, and future source non-modification report mappings.
observedGaps.futureNeed: A calibration-only check binding policy for test-only behavior proof fixtures.

observedGaps.whyItMatters: The output should report test Evidence status and source non-modification rather than claiming implementation work.
observedGaps.currentDraftSignal: outputRequirementSources include runtime Evidence status, attached Evidence boundary, production source unchanged, and non-promotion boundary obligations.
observedGaps.futureNeed: A source-authority resolver or preview that derives proof-only output requirements without treating them as execution output.

observedGaps.whyItMatters: A test-only fixture must stop if proof requires implementation changes.
observedGaps.currentDraftSignal: stopConditionSources include stop-if-runtime-proof-needs-production-source-edit and the test-only scope boundary preview states stop/report/no silent source edit.
observedGaps.futureNeed: A supported stop-condition policy for proof-only contracts; current preview does not execute a stop action.

observedGaps.whyItMatters: This fixture should later help detect when a contract that allows only tests/Evidence is violated by production source edits.
observedGaps.currentDraftSignal: riskSources and outputRequirementSources reference production source non-modification, but no compliance checker or diff authority exists.
observedGaps.futureNeed: A future non-enforcing compliance-checker bridge that can compare actual changed files with allowed and forbidden scope.

sourceAuthorityReuse.notes: The output requirement source-authority pattern is reusable, but the obligation target is Evidence status and source non-modification rather than implementation change reporting.
Forbidden production source and promotion/acceptance scope can be modeled, but detection needs a later diff/compliance binding.
Stop conditions are clear in the draft but not supported for proof-only fixture candidate generation.
Attached structure-only Evidence is visible, but authoritative runtime command Evidence is unresolved.
Product/Work/Test/Evidence references are present, but they remain structure-only context.
Scope drift, Evidence authority confusion, and acceptance-boundary confusion are visible as draft risks.
The draft names test/Evidence scope candidates, but there is no supported test-only allowed-scope policy yet.

unresolvedEvidence.reason: No authoritative runtime command output has been added for this calibration fixture.
No compliance-checker or diff report exists for production source non-modification.

recommendedNextStep.reason: After previewing runtime Evidence authority, DevView next needs to bind evidence types to required checks without marking the fixture supported.

nonExecutionBoundary: This observation is preview-only. It does not compile a contract candidate, execute AI, apply graph deltas, mutate graph source, approve promotion, satisfy runtime Evidence, create required checks, configure branch protection, or replace user acceptance.
